name: Oatmeal Raspberry Bar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter an 8-inch square pan and set aside.
3. Mix all ingredients together except the jam, except for stirring until combined.
4. Press 2 cups of the mixture into the bottom of the prepared pan.
5. Spread the raspberry jam over the mixture, leaving at least 1/4 inch from the edge.
6. Sprinkle the remaining crumb mixture over the top and lightly press it into the jam.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until set.
8. Allow to cool on a wire rack before cutting into 2 x 1-1/2-inch bars.
